nativeProps: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> with role and tabIndex reserved by focusable

props.name: focusable
props.type: boolean; true requires aria-label or aria-labelledby

compositionPolicy.nativeScrolling: The browser owns scrolling, scrollbars, touch momentum, keyboard scrolling, and wheel behavior.
compositionPolicy.focus: The root is not a tab stop by default. focusable=true is reserved for independently meaningful overflow regions and requires an accessible name.
compositionPolicy.enhancement: focusable and containOverscroll are independent; false removes the region/tab-stop/name output or scroll-chain containment respectively.
